commit.message:
feat: add CLI ingest command for manual session ingestion

Adds `theundercut ingest SEASON ROUND [--session SESSION] [--force]`
command to manually trigger session ingestion. The --force flag allows
re-ingestion even if the session is already marked as ingested.

This is useful for fixing failed ingestions or re-processing after
code fixes.

commit.message:
feat: breakdancer system, GUI fixes, and lazy asset loading

Breakdancer system:
- 3 independent FBX loads at staggered positions (not all on top of each other)
- Per-dancer AnimationMixer, animation index offset so each starts at different point
- LoopRepeat + setTimeout(clip.duration * 1000) for reliable animation chaining
- Per-dancer loading flag to prevent concurrent load races
- 34 Mixamo animations cycling indefinitely

GUI fixes:
- Remove Text Material folder (non-functional controls)
- Fix triple initGUI() by removing broken progressCallback pattern

Loading screen / lazy loading:
- Loading screen now hides after only waterNormals + font load (the true essentials)
- HDRI and audio lazy-load in background after scene is visible
- Small #lazy-status pill indicator shows what's loading in background
- Remove dead depth map code and duplicate animate() call
- Fix renderer.outputEncoding → renderer.outputColorSpace (Three.js r165+)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: assetLoader correctness fixes

- Fix loadAsset to not overwrite AnimationClip with full FBX group
- Fix processAnimation to store null for empty animation arrays
- Fix loadNextAnimation to use 'name in' cache check and always call callback
- Fix loadFallbackHDRI to use BASE_URL instead of absolute path
- Add loadCharacterModel() for lazy-loading FBX character per dancer
- Remove character model and audio from preload() essentials
- Remove broken progressCallback signature (was causing triple initGUI calls)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: update CLAUDE.md with Phase 1 learnings and implementation detail

Replaces the original planning doc with a post-build reference covering:
- Phase 1 complete status
- Actual repo structure and token counts
- Critical implementation discoveries (usesDtcg, $value accessor,
  dark namespace trick, varIdToFullRef, flutter color format)
- Known acceptable warnings
- Key implementation notes per file
- Phase 2+ monorepo migration plan

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: configure Vite base path for /funky subpath deployment

Set base: '/funky/' so all asset URLs are rewritten correctly when
served under a subpath. Also expose dev server on 0.0.0.0 and bump
Vite to 5.4.14.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve auth loading hang and React Router redirect crash after Docker rebuilds

- Eagerly import auth pages (Login/Signup/Onboarding) — no lazy loading on critical path
- Use window.location.replace() for auth redirects instead of React Router <Navigate />,
  which silently crashed inside createBrowserRouter transitions
- GuestRoute renders immediately without waiting for auth loading state
- Add safety timeout (8s) and initCalled guard in AuthProvider
- Serve index.html with Cache-Control: no-cache to prevent stale HTML after rebuilds
- Add node_modules and .tsbuildinfo to .dockerignore to prevent Windows artifacts in Docker
- Add RootErrorBoundary to App for crash resilience

commit.message:
Fix auth flow and API routing bugs

- Fix service worker API URL: /v1/grade → /api/grade
- Add onMessageExternal listener so magic link auth token reaches extension
- Fix CORS: use * instead of invalid chrome-extension://* wildcard
- Add /auth/signout route (dashboard sign-out was 404ing)
- Update sign-in button text to "Log In or Sign Up"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: avoid undefined behavior from unordered_set iterator invalidation in updateExtraFds()

When FileInputStream fds failed to add to epoll (EPERM for regular files),
the code erased from the unordered_set during a range-based for loop, which
is undefined behavior. This caused consistent crashes on aarch64 and
intermittent crashes on x86_64 during HTTP/3 static file serving.

commit.message:
Fix challenge flow: real-time delivery, accept→game navigation

Problems fixed:
- Challenge TTL was 60s, now 300s — recipients have time to see/accept
- findWsByAddress now returns latest open socket, not first stale one
- sendToAll broadcasts to ALL sockets for an address (multiple tabs)
- Accept no longer tries to join players via social WebSocket (wrong WS)
- Server sends challenge_accepted with game_id, clients auto-navigate
- Match page reads matchId from URL and auto-joins the game
- Layout watches acceptedGameId and routes to /match/{id}

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Apply to my plan — CMO analysis triggers plan regeneration with 7-day time gate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: fall back to OpenF1 when FastF1 has no position data

FastF1 relies on Ergast API for race classification data, but Ergast
often lacks data for recent races. When FastF1 returns results with all
NaN positions (which happens when Ergast has no data), the ingestion
now falls back to OpenF1 which can derive positions from lap timing.

This fixes race results not being stored for the 2026 Australian GP
and similar recent races where Ergast data is delayed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(bot): combine health and webhook on single port for Railway

Railway only exposes one PORT per service. Moved from separate health
(PORT) and webhook (PORT+1) servers to a single HTTP server that
handles both /health and /webhook on the same port.

Uses bot.createWebhook() callback instead of bot.launch({ webhook })
to allow sharing the HTTP server with the health endpoint.

commit.message:
fix: stabilize genre classifier with heavier smoothing and offline seeding

Genre was bouncing between rage_trap, theatrical, french_melodic on a
pure Playboi Carti track. Root causes: EMA smoothing half-life was only
0.11s (smoothing=0.9 at 60fps), feature window was 8s, and softmax
temperature allowed similar profiles to compete.

Changes:
- Increase default smoothing 0.9 → 0.995 (half-life ~2.3s at 60fps)
- Increase feature window 8s → 30s for more stable averages
- Lower softmax temperature 0.5 → 0.3 for more peaked distributions
- Add offline global seeding: pre-fill feature windows with track-wide
  averages so classification starts with reasonable context instead of
  drifting during the first 30s
- Update test to validate seeding behavior

commit.message:
Fix sonar rings using index hue and going white on trigger

Rings now snapshot getBallDisplayColor() at creation time, respecting
the active color mode. Skip trigger-reactive overlays (Trigger Bright,
Strobe) for rings — those were spiking lightness to 100 (white) since
lastTriggerFrame is set to simFrame at creation. Ripple is kept since
it is ambient/time-based rather than trigger-reactive.

fix: add TRY_HARDER hint and request 1080p for faster barcode detection

TRY_HARDER increases ZXing's sampling density per frame. Requesting
1920x1080 gives more pixels per barcode bar, making linear codes easier
to decode. Browser falls back to whatever the camera supports if 1080p
is unavailable.

Fix: clear QueryClient cache on logout to prevent stale DB state

for 5 minutes (staleTime), preventing refetch with the anon key.
This caused all Supabase queries to appear stuck/broken after logout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: rewrite segment classifier to use energy dynamics for drop detection

The old prototype-matching approach used a 4-second rolling window
average for all features. This completely washed out sudden energy
transitions — a drop going from e=0.29 to e=0.92 averaged to ~0.30
in the window, matching "verse" instead of "drop".

Replaced with a decision-tree classifier driven by energy dynamics:
- Short-term (0.5s) and medium-term (2s) feature windows
- Short-term derivative (current vs previous half-window) detects
  sharp transitions — the defining feature of drops and breakdowns
- Drop: energy > 0.55 AND (derivative spike > 0.08 OR sustained
  high energy + heavy sub-bass with low vocals)
- Breakdown: short energy < 0.28, sparse onsets
- Chorus: medium energy > 0.45 with vocals > 0.35
- Position-based intro (first 10%) and outro (last 10%)
- Increased smoothing min-run from 60 to 120 frames (2s)
- Updated all 25 tests including new test_energy_spike_detects_drop

commit.message:
fix: restrict barcode scanner to UPC/EAN formats for faster detection

Default BrowserMultiFormatReader scans all ~20 formats per frame.
Limiting to UPC-A, UPC-E, EAN-13, EAN-8 eliminates irrelevant format
overhead and significantly improves detection speed on mobile hardware.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix result overlay re-opening on navigation back to mine page

resultShown was component-local state that reset to null on unmount.
When navigating back, the effect saw lastResult as "new" and re-opened
the modal. Now persists the last shown result ID in sessionStorage so
it survives component remounts across page navigation.
